% fig_lec04_tangent_basis.tex — Coordinate basis vectors ∂_u Φ, ∂_v Φ at p ∈ M
% Data: generated by scripts/sim_lec03_charts.jl
%
% The vectors ∂/∂x¹|_p, ∂/∂x²|_p are the push-forward under  Φ = ψ⁻¹  of
% the standard basis on R².  They are genuine tangent vectors to the
% graph surface at p.

\begin{center}
\begin{tikzpicture}
  \pgfplotsset{
    colormap={cgbluetint}{rgb255(0cm)=(210,224,240) rgb255(1cm)=(112,156,200)},
  }

  % ── LEFT: M with p and basis tangent vectors ──────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=M,
      width=7.8cm, height=5.8cm,
      view={-28}{35},
      xmin=-3, xmax=3, ymin=-3, ymax=3, zmin=-1.1, zmax=1.1,
      axis lines=none, xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, ztick=\empty, clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot3[surf, opacity=0.30, shader=interp,
              colormap name=grsurface, mesh/rows=55, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_surface.dat};
    \addplot3[surf, opacity=0.35, shader=interp,
              colormap name=cgbluetint, mesh/rows=18, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_Oalpha_patch.dat};

    % Tangent vectors at p_cb
    \addplot3[
      quiver={u=\thisrowno{3}, v=\thisrowno{4}, w=\thisrowno{5}},
      -{Stealth[length=5pt, width=3.5pt]},
      banana!70!black, line width=1.0pt,
      no markers, forget plot,
    ] table[x index=0, y index=1, z index=2]
      {data/lec03_charts_tangent_cb.dat};

    \addplot3[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.8pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_point_cb_M.dat};

    \node[font=\sf\small, text=spacecadet]
      at (axis cs:-2.4,-2.8,1.0) {$\M$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!50!black, anchor=north east]
      at (axis cs:0.85,0.85,0.30) {$p$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!50!black, anchor=west]
      at (axis cs:1.85,0.95,0.02) {$\partial/\partial x^1|_p$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!50!black, anchor=south]
      at (axis cs:0.90,1.85,0.60) {$\partial/\partial x^2|_p$};
  \end{axis}

  % ── RIGHT: U ⊂ R² with standard basis at ψ(p) ─────────────
  \begin{axis}[
      name=U,
      at={($(M.east)+(1.6cm,0)$)}, anchor=west,
      width=4.5cm, height=4.5cm,
      axis lines=middle,
      axis line style={birrenorange, line width=0.6pt,
                       -{Stealth[length=5pt,width=3pt]}},
      xmin=-1.4, xmax=2.6, ymin=-1.1, ymax=1.9,
      xtick=\empty, ytick=\empty, clip=false,
  ]
    \addplot[fill=cgblue!15, draw=none, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_Ualpha_boundary.dat} \closedcycle;
    \addplot[only marks, mark=*, mark size=1.6pt, banana!90!black, forget plot]
      table {data/lec03_charts_point_cb_alpha.dat};
    % Standard basis at ψ(p): (1,0) and (0,1)
    \draw[-{Stealth[length=5pt, width=3.5pt]}, banana!70!black, line width=1.0pt]
      (axis cs:0.9,0.95) -- (axis cs:1.7,0.95);
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!50!black, anchor=west]
      at (axis cs:1.72,0.95) {$\partial/\partial x^1$};
    \draw[-{Stealth[length=5pt, width=3.5pt]}, banana!70!black, line width=1.0pt]
      (axis cs:0.9,0.95) -- (axis cs:0.9,1.65);
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!50!black, anchor=south]
      at (axis cs:0.9,1.67) {$\partial/\partial x^2$};
    \node[font=\sf\small, text=birrenorange] at (axis cs:2.4,1.60) {$\Rn{n}$};
    \node[font=\scriptsize, text=banana!60!black, anchor=north east]
      at (axis cs:0.88,0.91) {$\psi(p)$};
  \end{axis}

  \draw[thick, -{Stealth[length=7pt,width=4pt]}, cgblue]
    ($(M.east)+(0.05,0.15)$) -- ($(U.west)+(-0.05,0.15)$)
    node[midway, above, font=\small, text=cgblue]{$\psi$};
\end{tikzpicture}
\end{center}
